Uses of Package
org.apache.juneau.marshall.sse

Packages that use org.apache.juneau.marshall.sse
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.marshall.marshaller
Marshallers
org.apache.juneau.marshall.sse
Server-Sent Events (SSE) marshalling support — text/event-stream.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.sse
Server-Sent Events (SSE) support for Juneau REST servers.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.sse used by org.apache.juneau.marshall.marshaller
    Class
    Description
    SseParser
    Parses text/event-stream input (WHATWG Server-Sent Events) into Java objects.
    SseSerializer
    Serializes SseEvent objects to the text/event-stream wire format defined by the WHATWG Server-Sent Events spec.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.sse used by org.apache.juneau.marshall.sse
    Class
    Description
    SseEvent
    Represents a single Server-Sent Event (SSE) frame on the wire.
    SseParser
    Parses text/event-stream input (WHATWG Server-Sent Events) into Java objects.
    SseParser.Builder
    Builder class.
    SseParserSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of SseParser.
    SseParserSession.Builder
    Builder class.
    SseSerializer
    Serializes SseEvent objects to the text/event-stream wire format defined by the WHATWG Server-Sent Events spec.
    SseSerializer.Builder
    Builder class.
    SseSerializerSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of SseSerializer.
    SseSerializerSession.Builder
    Builder class.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.sse used by org.apache.juneau.rest.server.sse
    Class
    Description
    SseEvent
    Represents a single Server-Sent Event (SSE) frame on the wire.
